memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir Roger Norwood md Bona Fitzbernard, aka Bona de Waltham. Adding to his wealth, Bona brought to her husband the Manors of Shorne and Thornham. Sir Roger & Bonnefille begat…

Sir Roger de Northwode (c. 1230 – 9 November 1286) held the posts of Warden of the Cinque Ports and Baron of the Exchequer.[1]

He was a son of Sir Stephen de Northwode, Knight and his wife, Joan. Bot …

memoryArtifacts.headline: MINSTER CHURCH, ISLE OF SHEPPEY
memoryArtifacts.description:
The eighth oldest brasses in England, those of Sir John de Northwood and Lady Joan de Badlesmere dated to 1319 are to be found beneath a carpet in the Minster Church on the Isle of Sheppey.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Northwood於大約1215年出生在英國肯特時，他的父親Sir Stephen Northwode51歲，母親Joan Upchurch46歲。他於1248年之前與Bona FitzBernard在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1273年被列為baron of the exchecquer。他去世於1285年11月9日在他的家鄉享年71歲，埋葬在英國肯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Northwood于大约1215年出生在英国肯特时，他的父亲Sir Stephen Northwode51岁，母亲Joan Upchurch46岁。他于1248年之前与Bona FitzBernard在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1273年被列为baron of the exchecquer。他去世于1285年11月9日在他的家乡享年71岁，埋葬在英国肯特。

nameMeanings.name: Northwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2  English: perhaps also a variant of   Northard  .

variants.name: Norwood
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called Northwood or Norwood, such as Northwood in Essex, Middlesex, Isle of Wight, Norwood in Middlesex and Surrey, or Northwood Farm in Okehampton and Northwood Farm in Morchard Bishop, both in Devon. The placenames mean ‘north or northern wood’, from Old English north ‘north, northern’ + wudu ‘wood’ or Middle English north + wode. Compare Norrod .

variants.name: Northard
meanings: 1 English: locative name from Middle English northward ‘northward’, for someone who dwells to the north.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Northwood was born about 1215, in Kent, England, his father, Sir Stephen Northwode, was 51 and his mother, Joan Upchurch, was 46. He married Bona FitzBernard before 1248, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. In 1273, his occupation is listed as baron of the exchecquer. He died on 9 November 1285, in his hometown, at the age of 71, and was buried in Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Northwood est né environ 1215, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Stephen Northwode, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Joan Upchurch, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Bona FitzBernard avant 1248, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. En 1273, sa profession de son indiquée est baron of the exchecquer. Il est décédé le 9 novembre 1285, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Northwood um 1215 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Stephen Northwode 51 und seine Mutter Joan Upchurch 46. Er hat vor 1248 in England Bona FitzBernard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1273 ist sein Beruf als baron of the exchecquer aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. November 1285 im Alter von 71 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Northwood è nato il circa 1215 nel Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir Stephen Northwode, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Joan Upchurch, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Bona FitzBernard prima del 1248, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Nel 1273, la sua occupazione è indicata come baron of the exchecquer. Morì il 9 novembre 1285, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolto a Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Northwoodが約1215年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Sir Stephen Northwodeは51歳，母Joan Upchurchは46歳であった。1248年以前にイギリスでBona FitzBernardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1273年，職業はbaron of the exchecquerと記録されている。彼は1285年11月9日に故郷で71歳で死去し，イギリスケントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Northwood(이)가 대략 1215년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Stephen Northwode(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Upchurch(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1248년 이전 영국에서 Bona FitzBernard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1273년, 그의 직업은 baron of the exchecquer이었다. 그는 1285년 11월 9일 그의 고향에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Northwood nasceu aproximadamente 1215, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Stephen Northwode, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Joan Upchurch, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Bona FitzBernard antes 1248, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Em 1273, sua profissão aparece como baron of the exchecquer. Ele faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1285, em sua cidade natal, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Northwood родился около 1215 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Stephen Northwode было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Upchurch, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Bona FitzBernard перед 1248 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. В 1273 году он работал по профессии baron of the exchecquer. Он умер 9 ноября 1285 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Northwood nació aproximadamente 1215, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Stephen Northwode, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Joan Upchurch, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Bona FitzBernard antes de 1248, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. En 1273, su ocupación registrada era baron of the exchecquer. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1285, en su pueblo, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultado en Kent, Inglaterra.
